name: Material Essence Disruptor (Moderate)
description:
Activate 2 (manipulate)

A material essence disruptor emits bursts of disordered energy to break down the structure of a spell that manipulates material essence. Attempt to counteract an active arcane or primal spell within 40 feet, with a [[/r 1d20+13]]{+13} counteract modifier and a counteract rank of 4.
